_meta: Groupe Rapido — résidentiel. Single source of truth for rates. Bruno/LC edit numbers here; logic in pricing.js never changes.
_taxNote: TPS 5% + TVQ 9.975% applied on the subtotal.

2.5.label: 2½ (studio / 1 chambre)
2.5._watch: Faible échantillon (5 dossiers). Candidate to flip autoQuote->false after testing.

6.5.label: 6½ et plus
6.5._watch: Très faible échantillon (1 dossier). Candidate to flip autoQuote->false.

maison.label: Maison (unifamiliale)
maison._watch: Forte variabilité (écart-type 3,5h, 2h à 16h réel). Likely flip autoQuote->false.

_moversNote: movers is derived from size (the client no longer picks it). Per LC: 2½ = 2 movers, every other size = 3.

specialFee._note: Flat fee added to the subtotal PER checked item among these flags (1->250, 2->500, 3->750). Not itemized in the customer-facing widget; recorded in the Monday lead. These flags no longer route to a custom quote.

_servicesNote: Only 'residentiel' is auto-priced (the pricing doc is residential). Others -> custom_quote (reason 'service'). label must match the Monday Service column label exactly. (Sous-Traitance kept here for back-compat; removed from the form.)
_seasonNote: First matching band wins. Bands are MM-DD, recurring every year, no year-wrap.

exclusions._note: Any match -> response type 'custom_quote' (no final price). piano/coffreFort/objetArt moved to specialFee (flat surcharge, still instant). Size-level exclusion is driven by sizes[*].autoQuote, not here.
